query_title: Major League: Back to the Minors

recommendations.title: Little Big League
recommendations.overview: When the owner of the Minnesota Twins passes away, he bequeaths the team to his preteen grandson. The newly minted head honcho quickly appoints himself manager, causing unrest in an organization that struggles to take orders from a 12-year-old.

recommendations.title: Psych 2: Lassie Come Home
recommendations.overview: After Santa Barbara Police Chief Carlton Lassiter is ambushed and left for dead, Shawn and Gus return to help him and find themselves embroiled in a case involving the personal, the professional – and even the supernatural.

recommendations.title: Psych 3: This Is Gus
recommendations.overview: In preparation for a shotgun wedding before the birth of Baby Guster, Shawn and Gus go rogue in an attempt to track down Selene’s estranged husband, as Lassiter grapples with the future of his career.

recommendations.title: Bad News Bears
recommendations.overview: Morris Buttermaker is a burned-out minor league baseball player who loves to drink and can't keep his hands to himself. His long-suffering lawyer arranges for him to manage a local Little League team, and Buttermaker soon finds himself the head of a

recommendations.title: The Bad News Bears
recommendations.overview: An aging, down-on-his-luck ex-minor leaguer coaches a team of misfits in an ultra-competitive California little league.

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their patriarch Gus, the Portokalos family travels to Greece for a family reunion, and to deliver Gus' journal to his old friends.

recommendations.title: The Rookie
recommendations.overview: Jim Morris never made it out of the minor leagues before a shoulder injury ended his pitching career twelve years ago. Now a married-with-children high-school chemistry teacher and baseball coach in Texas, Jim's team makes a deal with him: if they wi

recommendations.title: Wrath of Man
recommendations.overview: A cold and mysterious new security guard for a Los Angeles cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman's ultimate motiv

recommendations.title: Champions
recommendations.overview: A stubborn and hotheaded minor league basketball coach is forced to train a Special Olympics team when he is sentenced to community service.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.
